name: webtalk_register_client
short_description: Register a new client with the Webtalk manager.
full_help:
webtalk_register_client

Description: 
Register a new client with the Webtalk manager.

Syntax: 
webtalk_register_client  -client <arg> [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  -client     string value that is the name of the client.
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories:

arguments.description: string value that is the name of the client.
Suspend message limits during command execution
